---
title: "Half-hour Plays: Rumpelstilskin and Other Plays from Old Fairy Tales. Adapted either for the village school or the drawing-room"
---

## Half-hour Plays: Rumpelstilskin and Other Plays from Old Fairy Tales. Adapted either for the village school or the drawing-room

**Author:** Amabel Jenner
**Date:** 1889
**Imprint:** London: Smith

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
